name: Sunflower Shoots
shortDescription: Nutty, crunchy microgreens perfect for salads and sandwiches.
description: Our sunflower shoots offer a delightful nutty flavor with a satisfying crunch. These nutrient-dense microgreens are packed with protein, healthy fats, and essential vitamins. Perfect for adding texture and flavor to salads, sandwiches, wraps, and smoothie bowls.
nutritionalBenefits: High in protein, vitamin E, folate, and healthy fats

name: Pea Shoots
shortDescription: Sweet, tender shoots with a fresh pea flavor.
description: Delicate pea shoots with a sweet, fresh taste reminiscent of spring peas. These tender microgreens are rich in vitamins A, C, and K, plus folate and fiber. Excellent for stir-fries, salads, or as a beautiful garnish for soups and main dishes.
nutritionalBenefits: Rich in vitamins A, C, K, folate, and fiber

name: Broccoli Microgreens
shortDescription: Intense broccoli flavor packed with sulforaphane.
description: These vibrant broccoli microgreens deliver an intense, concentrated broccoli flavor with exceptional nutritional benefits. Particularly high in sulforaphane, a powerful antioxidant compound. Perfect for health-conscious consumers looking to boost their nutrient intake.
nutritionalBenefits: Extremely high in sulforaphane, vitamin C, and antioxidants

name: Radish Microgreens
shortDescription: Spicy, peppery kick with vibrant red stems.
description: Add some heat to your dishes with our radish microgreens! These beautiful microgreens feature vibrant red stems and green leaves, delivering a spicy, peppery flavor that wakes up any meal. Rich in vitamin C and antioxidants.
nutritionalBenefits: High in vitamin C, antioxidants, and natural enzymes

name: Arugula Microgreens
shortDescription: Peppery, sophisticated flavor for gourmet dishes.
description: These delicate arugula microgreens pack the same peppery punch as mature arugula but with a more refined, less bitter taste. Perfect for upscale dining and gourmet preparations. Rich in calcium, iron, and vitamin K.
nutritionalBenefits: High in calcium, iron, vitamin K, and nitrates

name: Mizuna Microgreens
shortDescription: Mild mustard flavor with feathery, delicate leaves.
description: Beautiful mizuna microgreens with distinctive feathery leaves and a mild mustard flavor. These Asian greens offer a unique texture and subtle spice that complements both Eastern and Western cuisines. Packed with vitamins and minerals.
nutritionalBenefits: Rich in vitamins A, C, and calcium
